hero.title: Meister Holz
hero.subtitle: Carpentry and custom furniture in Munich. Bespoke furniture, renovations, and woodwork with passion and precision.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Craftsmanship with heart for three generations
about.heading: Tradition meets modern craftsmanship
about.text1: Since 1985, Meister Holz has stood for the highest quality in carpentry. What began as a small workshop under grandfather Heinrich has become a modern master workshop led by Stefan Zimmermann.
about.text2: We combine traditional craft techniques with cutting-edge CNC technology. Every piece is carefully planned and crafted — from the first design to final installation. Wood is our material, perfection is our standard.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From custom kitchens to complete renovations — we are your partner

items.title: Custom Furniture
items.description: Individual furniture to your specifications — cabinets, shelves, tables and more from fine woods.

items.title: Renovation
items.description: Complete interior builds, attic conversions, and modernization of older buildings.

items.title: Kitchen & Bath
items.description: Custom kitchens and bathroom furniture — designed, built, and installed by one team.

items.title: Repair & Emergency
items.description: Quick help with damage to doors, windows, furniture, and wood structures.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What our clients say about working with us

items.name: The Huber Family
items.text: Our new fitted kitchen is a dream. Mr. Zimmermann perfectly realized our vision. The quality of work is outstanding — every detail is just right.

items.name: Dr. Martin Keller
items.text: Meister Holz fitted out our entire dental practice. On time, clean, and to the highest quality. The collaboration was professional from start to finish.

items.name: Sandra Meier
items.text: The attic conversion completely transformed our home. The team was reliable, tidy, and creatively expanded our ideas. Absolutely recommended!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about our services

items.question: How does the inquiry process work?
items.answer: Contact us by phone or form. We'll arrange a free on-site consultation, take measurements, and prepare a no-obligation quote. Once commissioned, we begin planning and production.

items.question: What types of wood do you use?
items.answer: We work with a variety of woods: oak, beech, walnut, cherry, maple, and many more. We're happy to advise you on the optimal wood choice for your project.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: Duration depends on scope. A built-in cabinet takes 2-3 weeks, a complete kitchen 4-6 weeks. Larger renovation projects are planned individually with you.

items.question: Do you offer emergency service?
items.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency service for urgent repairs to doors, windows, and wood structures. Just call us — we'll be there quickly.

items.question: Do you work outside Munich?
items.answer: Yes, we serve the greater Munich area and also take on projects across Upper Bavaria. For larger commissions, we travel further.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.generalText: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR).
datenschutz.hostingText: Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc. When you visit, log data is automatically collected and deleted after 30 days.
datenschutz.cookiesText: Our website uses technically necessary cookies required for the operation of the site.
datenschutz.contactFormText: Your details from the contact form are stored for processing your inquiry. Processing is done through Web3Forms.
datenschutz.rightsText: You have the rights to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, and objection.
datenschutz.changesText: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy to ensure it always complies with current legal requirements.
